generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, PCBComponent, PowerSupplyComponent, RaspberryPiComponent, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ volume)"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (214×214×3 mm) controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan (airflow 0.02 m³/s) actuated through PCB circuitry for air circulation"
]

instance PCBComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuation control"
]

instance PowerSupplyComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance RaspberryPiComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C) with unique 64-bit serial code"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C) with unique 64-bit serial code"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C) with unique 64-bit serial code"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance RaspberryPi4HostingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware platform for hosting digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveThermalModelingService, ModelCalibrationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, SafetyChecksService
]

instance ScipyOptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library for non-linear least squares calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance OneWireBusProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance PCBDesignEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuation control"
    DTDFVocab:enables SafetyChecksService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model A (2 parameters: C_air, G_box) assuming no heatbed heat accumulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model B (4 parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box) accounting for heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyOptimizationEnabler
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction results from models"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters"
]

instance TemperatureRegulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current temperature status and regulation state"
]

instance PredictiveThermalModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive thermal modeling for temperature prediction using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration of model parameters using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for temperature regulation using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureRegulationInsight
]

instance SafetyChecksService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Safety checks via controller statechart logic for temperature thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides HeatingAction, WaitingAction
]

instance HeatingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Activate heating when temperature falls below lower threshold"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance WaitingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Deactivate heating when temperature exceeds upper threshold"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which translates these into hardware control signals through MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where physical components (heatbed, fan, sensors) communicate via RabbitMQ with DT components (controller, low-level driver, simulation models), forming a closed-loop system for monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Assumptions tested experimentally (e.g., temperature uniformity via three-sensor setup), model parameters calibrated to minimize residual error against experimental data, and validation of model predictions against real-world measurements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data exchange between physical and virtual components; 1-Wire bus for sensor communication with Raspberry Pi."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all DT components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety during operation, preventing unsafe actuation states."
]
